user.title: NDI Bridge
user.description: Enter the URL of your NDI Bridge addon (e.g. http://localhost:8080). Ensure the addon is installed and running with host network.

select_source.title: Select NDI source
select_source.description: Choose the NDI source to display.

error.cannot_reach_bridge: Could not reach the NDI Bridge or no sources found. Check the URL and that the addon is running.

abort.already_configured: This NDI source is already configured.
